data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of providing a temporary equipment loan during repair. However, the evidence does not include any concrete API reads or persisted state checks that confirm this requirement is satisfied. While the linked use case mentions the loaner mini-fridge being offered during repair, there is no supporting evidence in the prior steps to confirm its execution, indicating a clear gap in requirement coverage.
gaps: No evidence confirming the execution of the temporary equipment loan during repair.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add evidence for temporary equipment loan
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Verify that a temporary equipment loan is offered during the repair process.
